name: 18S_V4_Fungi
description: 18S rRNA hypervariable region V4 in eukaryotic group Fungi. ~510 bp on the S. cerevisiae rrn18 numbering (positions 565-1075). All fungi (Basidio + Asco + Mucoro); ITS preferred in practice but V9 is useful. V4 and V9 are the most widely used metabarcoding targets for eukaryotes (Stoeck 2010, de Vargas 2015 Tara Oceans). Allow high mismatch for cross-clade biology.
